name: ZenTabs Manager
author: Stephane
description: Advanced tab management: bi-directional bookmark sync, memory optimization, auto-cleanup, and intelligent tab organization

enabled.title: Enable ZenTabs Manager
enabled.description: Master switch for all ZenTabs features

syncInterval.title: Sync Interval (seconds)
syncInterval.description: How often to auto-sync (0 = manual only)

cleanupAge.title: Tab Max Age (days)
cleanupAge.description: Close unpinned tabs older than this many days

cleanupExcludeDomains.title: Cleanup Exceptions
cleanupExcludeDomains.description: Comma-separated domains to never auto-close (e.g., github.com, google.com)

memoryOptimization.title: Enable Memory Optimization
memoryOptimization.description: Unload tabs when memory gets low

memoryThreshold.title: Memory Threshold (%)
memoryThreshold.description: Unload tabs when memory usage exceeds this percentage

keepEssentialTabs.title: Protect Essential Tabs
keepEssentialTabs.description: Never cleanup or unload Essential tabs

keepPinnedTabs.title: Protect Pinned Tabs
keepPinnedTabs.description: Never cleanup pinned tabs (can still be unloaded)
